title: IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar (IIT Gandhinagar) Project Associate I Notification 2026 has been released on 29 May 2026 on the official website of IIT Gandhinagar. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate I Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.details: Project Associate I: B.Tech./B.E. Professional qualification or equivalent in an appropriate discipline. The percentage/grade points with respect to the academic qualifications will be a minimum of 60% or equivalent grade from Graduation onward and 55% or equivalent grade in class 10th and 12th. M.Tech. in Water Resources Engineering is desirable.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate I Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 06-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Project Associate I position at IIT Gandhinagar is June 6, 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate I post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.Tech./B.E. in an appropriate discipline with at least 60% marks from graduation onwards. Additionally, 55% is required in 10th and 12th standard. An M.Tech. in Water Resources Engineering is considered desirable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Associate I position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Associate I position is 35 years. Specific age relaxations may apply as per government regulations.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate I role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Associate I position will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 45,000 to Rs. 70,000.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate I post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Associate I position at IIT Gandhinagar.

faq.question: Q7. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The job is on a contractual basis for the Project Associate I position at IIT Gandhinagar.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Gandhinagar located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar is located in Gandhinagar, Gujarat.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is CON/10276/Advt0221.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for the Project Associate I position?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official website of IIT Gandhinagar on or before the last date of application.
